wizard.title: Project setup
wizard.completed: Setup complete! ConversionOS is now tracking your funnel.

step1.title: Basic info
step1.subtitle: Give your project a clear name that identifies the funnel.

step2.title: Type & platform
step2.subtitle: Select your funnel type and the platform it runs on.

step3.title: Configuration
step3.subtitle: Set the base URL and choose how ConversionOS will assist you.
step3.baseUrlHint: The root domain where your funnel lives.

step4.title: Funnel steps
step4.subtitle: Map each key page of your funnel so ConversionOS can track drop-offs.
step4.urlPatternHint: Path or pattern to match this step.

step5.title: Summary & installation
step5.subtitle: Review your setup and paste the snippet into your site.
step5.snippetHint: Paste this before the closing </head> tag on every page of your funnel.

detail.setupIncomplete: Setup is not complete. Finish configuring this project to start tracking.

supportMode.diagnosis_only_desc: Track events and get automatic diagnosis reports. No suggestions.
supportMode.assisted_optimization_desc: Diagnosis + AI-powered recommendations with estimated impact.
supportMode.automated_actions_supported_desc: Full pipeline: diagnosis, recommendations, and automated optimizations.
